summary: Fox Business 'Mornings with Maria' interview clip of NEC Director Kevin Hassett, broadcasting live from the White House lawn, touting factory construction jobs and Trump's economic agenda. Standard split-screen/remote talking-head TV hit with chyrons and stock tickers; not music-driven or stylized produced content.
notable_text: HASSETT ON STATE OF THE ECONOMY; Mornings with Maria; FOX BUSINESS; THE WHITE HOUSE LIVE
